businessBackground: TSX-listed (TSX:AIM) holding company in transition. Pre-Bozzetto-close (~6-8 weeks): two operating segments (Bozzetto chemicals being divested; Cortland International synthetic-fiber industrials) + Clear Media China outdoor advertising passive stake (10.85%) + corporate holdco. Post-deal: financial holding-company shell with CAD $181-185M cash + CAD $500M+ tax-loss carryforwards + Cortland (~$50-130M EV residual) + Clear Media (~$12-20M) + capital-deployment platform "permanent capital vehicle" strategy. Secondary listing JSE:AII (Johannesburg).

flex.name: Event Boundedness
flex.rationale: Hard deadline Q2 2026; binary redemption decision +30d

flex.name: Business-Event Separation
flex.rationale: Event transforms business identity; Cortland operationally unaffected

flex.name: Information Asymmetry
flex.rationale: Cortland trough partially priced; capital-deployment optionality not priced

universal.name: Mispricing Assessment
universal.rationale: +21% PW (1-yr) / +30% (6-mo annualized); 5 legs; arithmetic floor; reframed thesis avoids Part E cap

universal.name: Repricing Mechanism
universal.rationale: Bozzetto Q2 close 6-8wk + AGM May 13 + redemption +30d post-close

universal.name: Business Quality
universal.rationale: Cortland weak operating + Clear Media fragile; post-deal = financial holdco shell

universal.name: Balance Sheet & Torque (GATE)
universal.rationale: Post-deal net cash $185M + tax shield $500M+; pre-deal leveraged but covered by Bozzetto

rcChecklist.evidence: run filing-review on latest audited 10-K / 20-F / Annual Report

rcChecklist.criterion: Latest annual filing (10-K/20-F) reviewed within 12 months
rcChecklist.evidence: run filing-review on a 10-K/20-F/10-Q within 12 months

rcChecklist.criterion: ≥2 earnings transcripts reviewed (or waived if ticker has no transcripts available)
rcChecklist.evidence: no Transcripts/ folder, zero transcript rows, no inline citation
no forward catalyst found — update catalyst-tracker or THESIS Catalyst Timeline

rcChecklist.criterion: debate-session run across all 6 pressure vectors

rcChecklist.evidence: market-vs-me-diagnostic section present but >90 days old or no date

rcChecklist.criterion: conviction-scoring + cross-model-validation council both complete; angels-advocate if band ≥ HIGH_CONVICTION
rcChecklist.evidence: run cross-model-validation + conviction-scoring (+ angels-advocate if HIGH_CONVICTION)
